name: HRY_EVENT_EXT_RUNS
description: Updated details of the persons processed in the event enabled extracts.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_EXT_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Event Extract Run ID. Primary Key of the table.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Event Category ID. Reference ID mapping column to HRY_EVENT_CATEGOTIES table.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: Legislative Parameters required for the extract to be submitted.

columns.Name: PARAM_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date passed in the ESS Job Parameter Section.

columns.Name: PARAM_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End Date passed in the ESS Job Parameter Section.

columns.Name: REPORT_CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Report Category Id for Archive Write job submission.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Id Value for Archive Write job submission.

columns.Name: SOURCE_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Can be any ID value. FLOW_INSTANCE_ID for Archive Write job.

columns.Name: SOURCE_RUN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source Run Type value. FLOW_INSTANCE is the source run type for Instance ID as source run id.

columns.Name: LATEST_RUN
columns.Comments: This indicates if a event enabled person is picked up in the Latest Run or not.

columns.Name: EVENT_FETCH_TIME
columns.Comments: What time is the event fetched.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_EVENT_FETCH_TIME
columns.Comments: What time is the Previous Event Fetched.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Describes the status of the Event.

columns.Name: STATUS_MSG
columns.Comments: Detailed Message of the Status.

columns.Name: ROWS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: Number of the rows processed in a particular run.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE6
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE7
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE8
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE9
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE10
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: EXT_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Extract Definition ID Value for which event is processed.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
